# [Clang] Assertion `DD && "queried property of class with no definition"` failed.

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176397
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, confirmed, crash, lambda, regression:19, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-02-26T06:31:38Z

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 19.1.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/8fcesnhPs
Maybe related to #63242, but #63242 goes back to 17.0

## Program
```cpp
#include <functional>
auto recursiveLambda = [](auto, int n) {
  struct S;
  typeid(*static_cast<S *>(nullptr));
};
long result = recursiveLambda(recursiveLambda, 10);
```
